title: BCShop
description: An exclusive mod for SimMC Server, designed to collect QuickShop information within the server and display it on the website.
body:
This mod is exclusively designed for the SimMC server. Once installed, it automatically uploads nearby loaded shop information to the cloud, which is then aggregated and displayed on the website—BCS Terminal (https://s.eabal.com).

**We extend our gratitude to the volunteers on the server for their selfless dedication in maintaining real-time updates for the entire server's commercial information.**

---

本模组仅用于SimMC服务器，安装后自动将身边加载的商店信息上传至云端，最后在网站——BCS终端 (https://s.eabal.com) 上汇总展现。

**感谢服务器中志愿者们的无私奉献，共同维护全服商业信息的实时性。**
